# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Secure Self-Hosted Build and Deploy

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: 'Build script to execute'
        required: true
        type: string
      deploy_command:
        description: 'Deployment command to execute'
        required: false
        type: string
      environment:
        description: 'Target environment'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - development
          - staging
          - production
      approved_by:
        description: 'Approval ticket/PR number'
        required: true
        type: string

permissions:
  contents: read
  id-token: write

jobs:
  validate-inputs:
    runs-on: [self-hosted, security-scanner]
    outputs:
      validation_passed: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.passed }}
      sanitized_build_script: ${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.build_script }}
      sanitized_deploy_command: ${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.deploy_command }}
    steps:
      - name: Validate approval
        id: validate_approval
        run: |
          APPROVAL="${{ github.event.inputs.approved_by }}"
          if [[ ! "$APPROVAL" =~ ^(PR|TICKET)-[0-9]+$ ]]; then
            echo "Invalid approval format. Must be PR-#### or TICKET-####"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "approval=$APPROVAL" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Check user authorization
        run: |
          AUTHORIZED_USERS="${{ secrets.AUTHORIZED_DEPLOYERS }}"
          CURRENT_USER="${{ github.actor }}"
          
          if [[ ! "$AUTHORIZED_USERS" =~ (^|,)$CURRENT_USER(,|$) ]]; then
            echo "User $CURRENT_USER is not authorized for deployments"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Validate and sanitize inputs
        id: sanitize
        run: |
          BUILD_SCRIPT="${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}"
          DEPLOY_CMD="${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_command }}"
          
          # Block dangerous patterns
          BLOCKED_PATTERNS=(
            '\$\('
            '`'
            '\|\|'
            '&&'
            ';'
            '\$\{'
            'eval'
            'exec'
            '/dev/tcp'
            'curl.*\|'
            'wget.*\|'
            'nc -'
            'bash -i'
            '/bin/sh'
            'python -c'
            'perl -e'
            'ruby -e'
            'rm -rf /'
            'dd if='
            '>/dev/sd'
            'mkfs'
            'fdisk'
            ':(){:|:&};:'
            'chmod 777'
            'chown root'
            'sudo su'
            '/etc/passwd'
            '/etc/shadow'
            'base64 -d.*|'
          )
          
          check_input() {
            local input="$1"
            local name="$2"
            
            for pattern in "${BLOCKED_PATTERNS[@]}"; do
              if echo "$input" | grep -qiE "$pattern"; then
                echo "Blocked pattern detected in $name: $pattern"
                exit 1
              fi
            done
            
            # Check for null bytes
            if echo "$input" | grep -q $'\x00'; then
              echo "Null byte detected in $name"
              exit 1
            fi
            
            # Validate length
            if [ ${#input} -gt 1000 ]; then
              echo "$name exceeds maximum length"
              exit 1
            fi
          }
          
          check_input "$BUILD_SCRIPT" "build_script"
          if [ -n "$DEPLOY_CMD" ]; then
            check_input "$DEPLOY_CMD" "deploy_command"
          fi
          
          # Only allow whitelisted script paths
          if [[ ! "$BUILD_SCRIPT" =~ ^scripts/[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+\.(sh|py|js)$ ]]; then
            echo "Build script must be in scripts/ directory with allowed extension"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          # Sanitize by removing any remaining special chars
          CLEAN_BUILD=$(echo "$BUILD_SCRIPT" | tr -cd 'a-zA-Z0-9/_.-')
          CLEAN_DEPLOY=$(echo "$DEPLOY_CMD" | tr -cd 'a-zA-Z0-9/_. -')
          
          echo "build_script=$CLEAN_BUILD" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "deploy_command=$CLEAN_DEPLOY" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Security scan inputs
        run: |
          # Log for audit
          echo "Security scan initiated by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Approval: ${{ steps.validate_approval.outputs.approval }}"
          echo "Environment: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}"
          echo "Build script: ${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.build_script }}"
          
          # Additional security checks can be added here
          # e.g., integration with security scanning tools

      - name: Mark validation complete
        id: validate
        run: echo "passed=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

  build:
    needs: validate-inputs
    runs-on: [self-hosted, build-runner, '${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}']
    timeout-minutes: 30
    environment: 
      name: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}
    container:
      image: ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}/secure-build-container:latest
      credentials:
        username: ${{ github.actor }}
        password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      options: >-
        --read-only
        --tmpfs /tmp:rw,noexec,nosuid,size=1g
        --tmpfs /var/tmp:rw,noexec,nosuid,size=1g
        --security-opt=no-new-privileges
        --cap-drop=ALL
        --cap-add=CHOWN
        --cap-add=SETUID
        --cap-add=SETGID
        --network=none
        --cpus=2
        --memory=4g
        --pids-limit=100
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.sha }}
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Verify script exists and is safe
        run: |
          SCRIPT="${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.sanitized_build_script }}"
          
          if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then
            echo "Script not found: $SCRIPT"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          # Verify script is in git and not modified
          if ! git ls-files --error-unmatch "$SCRIPT" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
            echo "Script is not tracked in git"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          # Check file permissions
          PERMS=$(stat -c '%a' "$SCRIPT")
          if [ "$PERMS" != "644" ] && [ "$PERMS" != "755" ]; then
            echo "Invalid file permissions: $PERMS"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Setup build environment
        run: |
          # Create isolated workspace
          mkdir -p /tmp/build-workspace
          mkdir -p /tmp/build-output
          
          # Set restrictive umask
          umask 077
          
          # Export safe environment variables only
          export BUILD_ENV="${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}"
          export BUILD_SHA="${{ github.sha }}"
          export BUILD_REF="${{ github.ref }}"
          export BUILD_ACTOR="${{ github.actor }}"
          export BUILD_WORKSPACE="/tmp/build-workspace"
          export BUILD_OUTPUT="/tmp/build-output"
          
          # Clear potentially dangerous variables
          unset LD_PRELOAD
          unset LD_LIBRARY_PATH
          unset PYTHONPATH
          unset NODE_PATH

      - name: Execute build script in sandbox
        run: |
          SCRIPT="${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.sanitized_build_script }}"
          
          # Copy script to isolated location
          cp "$SCRIPT" /tmp/build-script
          chmod 500 /tmp/build-script
          
          # Execute with timeout and resource limits
          timeout 1800 nice -n 19 ionice -c 3 \
            /tmp/build-script
        env:
          BUILD_ENV: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}
          BUILD_SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
          PATH: /usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin
        working-directory: /tmp/build-workspace

      - name: Scan build artifacts
        run: |
          # Scan for malware/suspicious content
          if command -v clamscan &> /dev/null; then
            clamscan -r /tmp/build-output
          fi
          
          # Check for sensitive data
          if command -v trufflehog &> /dev/null; then
            trufflehog filesystem /tmp/build-output --no-update
          fi

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.sha }}
          path: /tmp/build-output
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: error

  deploy:
    needs: [validate-inputs, build]
    if: github.event.inputs.deploy_command != ''
    runs-on: [self-hosted, deploy-runner, '${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}']
    timeout-minutes: 20
    environment:
      name: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}
      url: https://${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}.example.com
    container:
      image: ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}/secure-deploy-container:latest
      credentials:
        username: ${{ github.actor }}
        password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      options: >-
        --read-only
        --tmpfs /tmp:rw,noexec,nosuid,size=512m
        --security-opt=no-new-privileges
        --cap-drop=ALL
        --cpus=1
        --memory=2g
        --pids-limit=50
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.sha }}
          path: /tmp/artifacts

      - name: Verify artifacts integrity
        run: |
          # Verify artifacts haven't been tampered with
          if [ ! -d "/tmp/artifacts" ]; then
            echo "Artifacts directory not found"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          # Check artifact count and size
          ARTIFACT_COUNT=$(find /tmp/artifacts -type f | wc -l)
          if [ "$ARTIFACT_COUNT" -eq 0 ]; then
            echo "No artifacts found"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          TOTAL_SIZE=$(du -sb /tmp/artifacts | cut -f1)
          MAX_SIZE=$((5 * 1024 * 1024 * 1024))  # 5GB
          if [ "$TOTAL_SIZE" -gt "$MAX_SIZE" ]; then
            echo "Artifacts exceed maximum size"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Validate deployment command
        run: |
          DEPLOY_CMD="${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.sanitized_deploy_command }}"
          
          # Whitelist of allowed deployment commands
          ALLOWED_COMMANDS=(
            "deploy.sh"
            "kubectl apply"
            "helm upgrade"
            "ansible-playbook"
            "terraform apply"
          )
          
          COMMAND_ALLOWED=false
          for allowed in "${ALLOWED_COMMANDS[@]}"; do
            if [[ "$DEPLOY_CMD" == "$allowed"* ]]; then
              COMMAND_ALLOWED=true
              break
            fi
          done
          
          if [ "$COMMAND_ALLOWED" = false ]; then
            echo "Deployment command not in whitelist"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Execute deployment with restrictions
        run: |
          DEPLOY_CMD="${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.sanitized_deploy_command }}"
          
          # Set up deployment environment
          export DEPLOY_ENV="${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}"
          export DEPLOY_SHA="${{ github.sha }}"
          export DEPLOY_ACTOR="${{ github.actor }}"
          export ARTIFACTS_PATH="/tmp/artifacts"
          
          # Execute with timeout
          timeout 1200 $DEPLOY_CMD
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}
          PATH: /usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin

      - name: Verify deployment
        run: |
          # Add deployment verification checks
          echo "Deployment completed for environment: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}"
          echo "Deployed by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Approval: ${{ github.event.inputs.approved_by }}"

  audit-log:
    needs: [validate-inputs, build, deploy]
    if: always()
    runs-on: [self-hosted, audit-runner]
    steps:
      - name: Log deployment activity
        run: |
          cat << EOF > /var/log/cicd-audit/deployment-${{ github.run_id }}.log
          Timestamp: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
          Run ID: ${{ github.run_id }}
          Actor: ${{ github.actor }}
          Repository: ${{ github.repository }}
          Environment: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}
          Build Script: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.sanitized_build_script }}
          Deploy Command: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.sanitized_deploy_command }}
          Approval: ${{ github.event.inputs.approved_by }}
          Build Status: ${{ needs.build.result }}
          Deploy Status: ${{ needs.deploy.result }}
          SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
          Ref: ${{ github.ref }}
          EOF
          
          # Send to SIEM/logging system
          if command -v logger &> /dev/null; then
            logger -t cicd-audit -f /var/log/cicd-audit/deployment-${{ github.run_id }}.log
          fi

      - name: Notify security team on failure
        if: failure()
        run: |
          echo "Security alert: Deployment workflow failed"
          echo "Run ID: ${{ github.run_id }}"
          echo "Actor: ${{ github.actor }}"
          # Add notification logic here (e.g., webhook, email, Slack)
